dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9652 IH: Northern Marianas VA Community-Based Outpatient Clinic Authorization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. King-Hinds introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To authorize the Secretary of Veterans Affairs to carry out a minor medical facility project in Saipan, Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Northern Marianas VA Community-Based Outpatient Clinic Authorization Act of 2026.

section.header: Authorization of minor medical facility project for community-based outpatient clinic in Saipan, Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands

subsection.text: The Secretary of Veterans Affairs may carry out a minor medical facility project in fiscal year 2027 in Saipan, Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, for the construction, lease, build-to-lease, renovation, alteration, repair, or retrofit of a community-based outpatient clinic in an amount not to exceed $3,696,000.

In carrying out the project authorized under subsection (a), the Secretary may use amounts authorized to be appropriated under subsection (e) to conduct such construction activities as the Secretary determines appropriate for such project.

In carrying out the project authorized under subsection (a), the Secretary may apply such alternative building, design, space, resiliency, or construction standards as the Secretary determines appropriate for the unique geographic, logistical, and market conditions of the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, if the Secretary determines such standards will ensure that the facility is safe, accessible, functional, and suitable for the delivery of outpatient care under laws administered by the Secretary to veterans.

In determining the feasibility of the project under subsection (a) or in determining the type of facility at which to carry out the project under such subsection (a), the Secretary shall consider the elevated costs and logistical challenges associated with construction, leasing, renovation, alteration, repair, and retrofit activities in the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, including—

paragraph.text: the lack of a permanent Department of Veterans Affairs clinical presence in the Commonwealth;
the geographic distance of existing medical facilities from the Commonwealth;
the need to ship construction materials for such project by ocean transport;
the need to reduce the burden of traveling to medical facilities for veterans residing in the Commonwealth.

subsection.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary for fiscal year 2027, for the project authorized under subsection (a), $3,696,000, to be deposited in the Construction, minor Projects account of the Department.
